title: Quoted replies inside bubbles, icon-only action buttons, remove extra character counter

requirements.text: Move quoted reply previews inside the chat bubble so they appear as part of the message bubble content, above the message text, rather than outside or above the bubble.

quotes: Put quoted replies inside of the chat bubble

acceptanceCriteria: Quoted reply context renders inside the chat bubble container, visually contained within the bubble's background/border
Quoted reply appears above the message text within the same bubble
No style changes to colors, fonts, spacing, or bubble shape

requirements.text: Make message action buttons (reply, react, pin, etc.) always visible on every message bubble without requiring hover. Remove all text labels from action buttons, keeping only the icons.

quotes: Make the action buttons always visible but remove the labels from them (keep the icon only)

acceptanceCriteria: Action buttons are visible at all times on every message bubble, not only on hover
Action buttons show only icons — no text labels beside or below them
All existing action button icons remain unchanged
No other style or layout changes are made

requirements.text: Remove the character counter displayed below the chat input field. The circular character counter rendered inside the chat input must remain intact and unchanged.

quotes: remove the extra chat input counter below the chat input (keep the circular one inside the chat input)

acceptanceCriteria: No character count text or indicator appears below the chat input field
The circular progress/counter indicator inside the chat input field is still present and functional
No other changes to the chat input layout or styling

constraints: Do not change any styles — colors, typography, spacing, border radii, shadows, or component themes must remain identical to Version 348
nonGoals: Altering the chat input functionality beyond removing the below-input counter
